description: You are a fish passage specialist conducting an aquatic organism passage (AOP) compliance audit for the Willamette National Forest road system in Oregon. In the stream_crossing_aquatic_passage_audit.gpkg project in QField, identify and update records in the stream_crossings layer that are incorrectly marked as aop_status='PASSING' but violate USFS AOP design criteria (outlet drop height, outlet-to-bankfull width ratio, channel slope, structure type, and substrate type). For each non-compliant crossing, change the status to 'FAILING', add a passage_barrier_note describing the specific violation, and save the changes.

metadata.data_source: OSM Overpass API (Willamette NF, OR) + USFS AOP Design Guide 2021 / ODFW standards
